message:
Enhance schema parsing, ALTER TABLE validation, JSON/misc extensions, and test stability

- compat_persist.rs: Add extract_default_value() for DEFAULT clause parsing
- connection.rs: Add NOT NULL + DEFAULT validation for ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN
- ext-json: JSON extension enhancements
- ext-misc: Miscellaneous extension improvements
- semantic.rs: Parser semantic analysis improvements
- codegen.rs: Planner codegen improvements
- engine.rs: VDBE engine improvements
- wal.rs: WAL improvements
- compat tests: Updated compat and migration tests
- .gitignore: Add .env and .claude/settings.local.json

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
